name: knowledge-base-system
description: Automated knowledge base with memory capture, promotion evidence tracking, and cross-repo consistency checks
author: Patryk Kopycinski

SessionStart.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "💡 Knowledge Base System active

• Promotion evidence: Auto-captured on git commit/PR
• Session learnings: Auto-captured on exit
• Cross-repo checks: /check-cross-repo-consistency

View memories: ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/"}'
